[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Gulley''' was an [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] onboard the ''[[Volant]]'' during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. Gulley had been [[Plat Mallar]]'s check pilot during Mallar's training as an escort pilot.

{{Char-stub}}

*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
